title: malcolmia parviflora
intro: Malcolmia parviflora, also known as the lesser cress, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Malcolmia parviflora include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
